summary: Completed comprehensive testing of R2A Industrie stock management application. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, dashboard, navigation, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@r2a-industrie.com / Admin123!)
Dashboard stats API returns correct structure with 12 product categories
Login page renders with email/password fields and submit button
Dashboard shows 5 stat cards (Total Articles, Stock Faible, En Rupture, Ventes du Mois, Total Clients)
Dashboard shows 14 category tiles (12 product families + Ventes + Clients)
Category tile navigation works (tested with hydraulique category)
Ventes and Clients tiles navigate to correct pages
Sidebar navigation with 5 menu items (Tableau de bord, Produits, Ventes, Clients, Paramètres)
User dropdown menu with logout functionality
Logout clears session and redirects to login
Mobile responsive layout with collapsible sidebar
Mobile sidebar toggle and close functionality
All API endpoints return proper error codes for unauthorized access
